channel.title: JTF News - Just The Facts
channel.description: Verified facts from multiple sources. No opinions. No adjectives. No interpretation. Viewer-supported at github.com/sponsors/larryseyer

item.title: Senegal lawmakers passed legislation increasing penalties for same-sex conduct t...
item.description: Senegal lawmakers passed legislation increasing penalties for same-sex conduct to up to 10 years imprisonment.

item.title: Three brothers were arrested following an explosion at the U.S. Embassy in Oslo.
item.description: Three brothers were arrested following an explosion at the U.S. Embassy in Oslo.

item.title: At least 17 people were killed after drone strikes on a school in Sudan.
item.description: At least 17 people were killed after drone strikes on a school in Sudan.

item.title: Three people, including a French aid worker, were killed in drone strikes in a r...
item.description: Three people, including a French aid worker, were killed in drone strikes in a rebel-held city in the Democratic Republic of Congo.
